types.name: ROUNDING_FLOOR
types.description: Value computation rounded down via Move integer division or sui::math::mul_div

types.name: ROUNDING_CEIL
types.description: Value computation rounded up via sui::math::mul_div_ceil or manual ceil division

types.name: MIXED_ROUNDING_DIRECTION
types.description: Floor and ceil used in the same computation flow where rounding should be consistent
markers: both mul_div and mul_div_ceil in same flow

types.name: PRECISION_TRUNCATION
types.description: Conversion between integer widths or Balance<T> -> u64 that loses information

types.name: MULT_BEFORE_DIV
types.description: Multiplication before division ordering that could overflow or lose precision without mul_div helper

types.name: CHECKED_ARITHMETIC_GAP
types.description: Arithmetic path that sidesteps Move's abort-on-overflow semantics via widening/narrowing mix or explicit wrapping diff

types.name: ZERO_AMOUNT_PASSTHROUGH
types.description: Zero-amount inputs bypass assertions and produce degenerate state transitions on Coin/Balance operations

types.name: OWNER_ONLY
types.description: Cap-based owner gating: function requires a specific capability object or a sender equality check

types.name: NO_ACCESS_CONTROL
types.description: public or entry function accepts &mut SharedObject without a capability or sender check

types.name: GENESIS_BYPASS
types.description: Logic paths tied to the one-time-witness module initializer

types.name: PAUSE_GATE
types.description: Pause flag enforced on a shared config object; absence or bypass exposes paused paths

types.name: LOOP_STORAGE_MUTATION
types.description: Storage mutation (dynamic_field / table / bag add or field write on &mut SharedObj) inside a loop

types.name: UNBOUNDED_ITERATION
types.description: Loop bound is user- or attacker-influenced over vectors, tables, or bags

types.name: READ_WRITE_GAP
types.description: Read-modify-write gap across PTB command boundaries or cross-module calls

types.name: DELETE_IN_LOOP
types.description: Deletion inside a loop over vectors, tables, or dynamic fields

types.name: COUNTER_INCREMENT
types.description: Monotonic counter mutation on a shared object

types.name: COLLECT_THEN_ITERATE
types.description: Collect-then-iterate pattern across object state

types.name: ORACLE_PRICE_DEP
types.description: Dependence on an oracle price read from a shared oracle object

types.name: ORACLE_STALENESS
types.description: Oracle timestamp comparison against &Clock shared object (0x6)

types.name: CROSS_CONTRACT_CALL
types.description: Call into another published package's public function; risk from version pinning and PTB routing

types.name: QUERY_DEPENDENCY
types.description: Read from shared objects owned by a different package version
markers: reads from shared object of different package version

types.name: ORACLE_ERROR_SWALLOWED
types.description: Oracle error or missing price handled by fallback to stale value

types.name: FIRST_DEPOSITOR_PATH
types.description: First-depositor branch on empty-reserve AMM/pool state

types.name: PROPORTIONAL_SHARE
types.description: Proportional share computation on LP/share Coin<T>

types.name: FEE_COMPUTATION
types.description: Fee computation on swap or flow

types.name: SLIPPAGE_PROTECTION
types.description: Minimum-out assertion protecting against price movement

types.name: PRICE_FROM_RESERVES
types.description: Spot price derived from pool reserves; manipulable within a single PTB

types.name: PASSIVE_ORDER_GEN
types.description: Passive resting order generation (DeepBook-style)

types.name: CLEARING_PRICE_SELECTION
types.description: Clearing price selection in auction modules

types.name: MINIMUM_SIZE_CHECK
types.description: Minimum trade or deposit size check

types.name: CRON_BATCH
types.description: Off-chain keeper entry function iterating a shared queue

types.name: CANCEL_BEFORE_CREATE
types.description: Same-transaction remove-then-add in a dynamic-field-backed queue
markers: remove then add in same tx on dynamic-field queue

types.name: MULTI_HOP_CHAIN
types.description: Sequential Coin<T> outputs feeding the next swap_exact_in, in one function or across PTB commands

types.name: EARLY_RETURN_BRANCH
types.description: Guard clause returns before state updates

types.name: FUND_VERIFICATION
types.description: Fund sufficiency check on incoming Coin<T> / Balance<T>

types.name: REFUND_CALCULATION
types.description: Refund path using coin::split / balance::split

types.name: MINT_AND_BURN
types.description: Mint/burn authority exercised via TreasuryCap<T> or Supply<T>

types.name: DUST_ACCUMULATION
types.description: Residual dust left in pool or vault after operation

types.name: BLOCK_HEIGHT_DISCRIMINATION
types.description: Decision gated on epoch, epoch timestamp, or clock timestamp

types.name: MAKER_TAKER_SPLIT
types.description: Maker/taker fee or role split (DeepBook-style)

types.name: ORDER_ID_MANIPULATION
types.description: Order id derived from bit-packed fields on DeepBook-style orders

types.name: INVARIANT_PRESERVATION
types.description: Explicit invariant assertion on pool / share / reserve identity

types.name: BALANCE_ACCOUNTING
types.description: Balance / supply accounting reconciliation across a flow

types.name: SHARED_OBJECT_UNGUARDED_WRITE
types.description: public or entry function accepts &mut SharedObject without a capability or sender check; any transaction can mutate it

types.name: OWNED_OBJECT_UID_REUSE
types.description: UID allocated then stored on an unreachable path, or a stale ID reused in an equality check after destructuring

types.name: VERSION_BUMP_MISSING
types.description: Mutation to a shared object with a version/schema_version field does not bump the field, defeating cross-version gating

types.name: IMMUTABLE_OBJECT_WRONGLY_MUTATED
types.description: Logical mutation attempted on state frozen via transfer::public_freeze_object, or freeze occurs before config finalization

types.name: OBJECT_DELETE_WITHOUT_UID_DELETE
types.description: Struct destructured without object::delete(id), or destructor drops object while dynamic fields still exist on its UID
markers: let T { id, ... } = obj; without object::delete(id)
dynamic field add without matching remove before destruction

types.name: WRAPPING_A_SHARED_OBJECT
types.description: Shared object moved into a wrapper struct's field; once wrapped, no longer addressable and its dynamic fields become orphaned
markers: assignment of shared-at-init object into struct field

types.name: PTB_OBJECT_HANDOFF_MISMATCH
types.description: Function returns Coin<T>, Object, or hot-potato assumed to be forwarded to a specific follow-up; PTB allows routing to any matching function

types.name: PTB_TYPE_ARGUMENT_MISMATCH
types.description: PTB routes a generic value across steps with mismatched TypeArgument<T>; module fails to assert phantom-type equality
markers: generic function with Coin<T> no phantom pairing assertion

types.name: PARTIAL_PTB_ROLLBACK_ASSUMPTION
types.description: Code assumes later PTB command can fail while earlier commands persist; PTBs are all-or-nothing

types.name: SPLIT_TRANSFER_REENTRY
types.description: Within one PTB, attacker intersperses SplitCoins and TransferObjects between protocol commands to intercept or recycle returned Coin<T>, yielding a flash-loan-like pattern

types.name: UPGRADE_POLICY_TOO_PERMISSIVE
types.description: UpgradeCap retains compatible policy when additive or dep_only would suffice, widening attack surface for future upgrades

types.name: ENTRY_FN_SIGNATURE_CHANGE
types.description: New package version silently changes behavior of an entry function whose signature is preserved
markers: v1/v2 entry fun pairs with different internal logic

types.name: FRIEND_VISIBILITY_LOST_ON_UPGRADE
types.description: public(friend) or public(package) visibility re-declared across upgrade exposes previously friend-only state
markers: new v2 modules calling v1 friend functions

types.name: UPGRADECAP_EXPOSURE
types.description: UpgradeCap held by an EOA, shared object, or weakly-gated wrapper; compromise replaces all package logic

types.name: DOF_UNBOUNDED_GROWTH
types.description: dynamic_field / dynamic_object_field / table / bag add in a loop or user-facing entry function with no cap

types.name: DOF_KEY_COLLISION
types.description: Two distinct code paths add fields under the same (TypeTag, name) key; second write silently overwrites or aborts
markers: shared integer name-space for different logical children

types.name: DOF_REMOVED_WITHOUT_DELETE_CASCADE
types.description: Parent destructor calls object::delete(id) without first removing all dynamic fields; fields orphaned, Balance/Coin stranded
markers: destructor that destructures and deletes UID
dynamic_field::add on UID not matched by remove before destruction

types.name: ONE_TIME_WITNESS_REUSE
types.description: OTW-typed parameter accepted outside init, or missing sui::types::is_one_time_witness assertion
markers: function accepting OTW type outside init signature

types.name: DISPLAY_CAP_EXPOSURE
types.description: Display<T> or Publisher object shared or transferred to untrusted holder

types.name: TREASURY_CAP_LEAK_VIA_PUBLIC_TRANSFER
types.description: TreasuryCap<T> transferred via public_transfer to attacker-influenced recipient or stored in weakly-gated shared object
markers: TreasuryCap<T> inside shared object with no cap-of-cap gating
